Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Continued To Apr-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clinton Killian for (petitioner) James Carteris.

The court stated that notice to the prior personal representative was not given as required per Rule 7.704. Mr. Killian stated that a copy of the petition was sent but not formal notice, that he is in constant contact with Mr. Wellen, that notice is only required if fees are due to the prior representative citing P.C. 10805 and requested that distribution be allowed. The court took the accounting petition (with the exception of payment of statutory fees to the personal representative)under submission. The accounting petition (with regard to the payment of fees to the personal representative) was continued to April 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow for notice to the former personal representative regarding fees.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Payment Of Attorney Fees For Extraordinary Services
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Denied

Petition For Payment Of Attorney Fees For Extraordinary Services
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Payment Of Attorney Fees For Extraordinary Services
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Continued To Oct-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clinton Killian for Jesse Wellen. Clifford Fried for Petitioners.

Mr. Killian stated that they are in the process of finalizing tax returns and the remaining liquid assets by the end of the year, that there is an outstanding creditor's claim that they are still negotiating and attempting to settle, and that they may face litigation. The Court stated that it normally does not allow extraordinary fees but that it will consider some portion of statutory fees, and raised the issue of no itemization of fees. Mr. Killian stated that declarations regarding billings were filed on October 11, 2013 and that all fees are extraordinary. The Petition for Payment of Attorney Fees, etc. was continued to October 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to review said declarations.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
